_meta.note: Simple card re-scope (supersedes node 20315:6122 / file aHtnwyPhI8WRbiGHZ8E5Gb family restyle). Shadow is a styles-collection switch: classic/mixed = 0 8 20 0, modern = none. Outline transparent in all styles. effects/shadow/default #00396b29 here is KNOWN Figma drift (FND-065); canonical shadow color = #21262d29 per FND-003 sign-off — do not re-flag.

variables.-loop shadows/cards: Effect(type: DROP_SHADOW, color: effects/shadow/default, offset: (card/shadow/x-position, card/shadow/y-position), radius: card/shadow/blur, spread: card/shadow/spead)
variables.Body/Text/Small/Regular: Font(family: "IBM Plex Sans", style: Regular, size: 13, weight: 400, letterSpacing: 1)
variables.Body/Text/Base/Regular: Font(family: "IBM Plex Sans", style: Regular, size: 14, weight: 400, letterSpacing: 1)
